$schema: Single source of truth for the metadata-fetcher registry. Both the runtime code in src/builtins.ts and the offline analyzer in tools/analyze.mjs read this. A vitest test in src/builtins.test.ts verifies FETCHERS_BY_KEY's keys match this object's `fetchers` map exactly, so adding a fetcher to one without the other fails CI.

orf.notes: Per-channel audioapi.orf.at endpoint declared in YAML

bbc.notes: metadataUrl is a slug, not a URL — fetcher routes via worker /api/public/bbc/

srgssr-il.notes: SRG SSR Integration Layer — serves all 14 SRF/RTS/RSI/RTR channels

swiss-radio.notes: Radio Swiss Pop / Jazz / Classic; worker-proxied

azuracast.notes: Generic AzuraCast nowplaying API — used by Kontrafunk and others

swr.notes: playerbar JSON; richest payload (track + cover + program + presenter)

streamabc.notes: Generic api.streamabc.net; used by Klassik Radio family

ffh.notes: FFH family endpoint covers FFH + harmony.fm + planet radio + sub-brands; metadataUrl carries the mountpoint key, not a URL

rbb-radioeins.notes: HTML fragment regex parser; only Radio Eins

laut-fm.notes: Community-radio platform; metadataUrl carries the slug

antenne.notes: Shared by Antenne Bayern + Rock Antenne + Oldie Antenne; metadataUrl carries API URL with mountpoint hash
